summary: The user sought strategies to establish a consistent early wake-up routine and discussed tracking their sleep and daily habits in a physical journal. They decided to focus on using the journal to include meditation and reading, and they have been setting their alarm 30 minutes earlier to utilize that time for meditation and planning their day.
facts: The user has been tracking their sleep and wake-up time in a physical journal. The user has started tracking their meditation and reading habits in the same journal. Three weeks ago, the user decided to start setting their alarm clock 30 minutes earlier every day. The user plans to use the extra morning time for meditation and to review their schedule and prioritize tasks. The user is trying to get into meditation and wants to focus on their breathing and set intentions for the day.
